zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Harbottle於1401年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓時，他的父親Robert Harbottle31歲，母親Isabel Monbourcher33歲。他於從1424年6月14日到1424年8月20日與Margaret Ogle結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1401年住在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德哈波特爾。他去世於1443年11月14日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Harbottle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from Harbottle (Northumberland). The placename appears to derive from Old English hȳra ‘hireling’ or hȳr ‘hire, wages’ + bōtl ‘dwelling, house’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Harbottle was born in 1401, in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Harbottle, was 31 and his mother, Isabel Monbourcher, was 33. He married Margaret Ogle from 14 June 1424 to 20 August 1424. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Harbottle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom in 1401. He died on 14 November 1443, in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Harbottle est né en 1401, à Preston, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Harbottle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Monbourcher, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ogle du 14 juin 1424 au 20 août 1424. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Harbottle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1401. Il est décédé le 14 novembre 1443, à Preston, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Harbottle 1401 in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Harbottle 31 und seine Mutter Isabel Monbourcher 33. Er hat von 14. Juni 1424 bis 20. August 1424 Margaret Ogle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1401 hat er in Harbottle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 14. November 1443 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Harbottleが1401年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプレストンで生まれた時，父Robert Harbottleは31歳，母Isabel Monbourcherは33歳であった。から1424年6月14日まで1424年8月20日にMargaret Ogleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1401年にはイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドハーボットルに住んでいた。彼は1443年11月14日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプレストンで42歳で死去した。

ko.Preston, Yorkshire East Riding, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 프레스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Harbottle(이)가 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Harbottle(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Monbourcher(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1424년 6월 14일부터 1424년 8월 20일까지 Margaret Ogle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1401년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 하르벗틀에서 살았다. 그는 1443년 11월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프레스턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Ogle de 14 de junho de 1424 a 20 de agosto de 1424. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Harbottle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1401.
